notes: Per-polygon light resolved from the data texture: floor/media use floor_light (pd0.w), ceiling uses ceiling_light (pd1.x via poly_texel1); walls keep their baked in.light. The resolved light flows through VertexOutput.light (flat), so the existing fragment `let light = in.light` now consumes data-texture light instead of the baked attribute. Added shader_wgsl_validates_under_webgl2_capabilities (naga Validator with Capabilities::empty() = WebGL2 baseline) as headless proxy for 'pipeline builds under WebGL2 limits', plus assertions that poly_texel1/resolved_light are present. 29 lib + 10 integration tests pass; wasm32 cargo check green.
